full_text:
Tissue was minced in small pieces and dissociated with: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before, in the middle, and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. After RBC lysis and centrifugation, the pellet had layers; the bottom looked normal but the top looked yellowish. Did the RBD lysis again and refiltered the cells. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 ml of media, diluted 1:10 for counting and counted.

Cell counts:

Freezing

3 vials of 3.68 E6 cells each were frozen. The cells were resuspended in 1 mL of STEMCELL Banker in each tube.

Flow cytometry staining

Aliquoted 4 vials of 1.5 E6 cells each to Maria for flow cytometry staining.

 | viability [%] | 79.9
 | size [µm] | 10.8

 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 1.31
 | viability [%] | 74.1

Average | [cells/ml] | 1.705 E6 x 10
